mapper.select: SELECT B.mch_name, SUM(team_person) AS pNum FROM travel_team A LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, mch_name, account_type FROM attract_user) B ON B.USER_ID = A.user_id AND B.account_type=3 GROUP BY A.user_id ORDER BY pNum DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT B.mch_name, COUNT(A.user_id) AS teamNum FROM travel_team A LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, mch_name, account_type FROM attract_user) B ON B.USER_ID = A.user_id AND B.account_type = '3' GROUP BY A.user_id ORDER BY teamNum DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT B.mch_name, SUM(A.attendance) AS teamNum FROM team_user_ref A LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id, mch_name, account_type FROM attract_user) B ON B.USER_ID = A.user_id where B.account_type =#{account_type} GROUP BY A.user_id ORDER BY teamNum DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT ac.mch_name, COUNT(*) AS teamNum FROM (SELECT au.mch_name, au.user_id FROM team_user_ref tuf LEFT JOIN (SELECT mch_name, user_id FROM attract_user) au ON tuf.user_id = au.user_id WHERE TYPE = #{account_type}) ac GROUP BY ac.mch_name ORDER BY teamNum DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT a.months, IFNULL(ROUND(b.sussm), 0)total FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(mon) = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT (CURRENT_DATE, 5) - 0, '-0', mon) ELSE CONCAT(LEFT (CURRENT_DATE, 5) - 0, '-', mon) END months FROM (SELECT @m := @m + 1 mon FROM team_user_customer_ref, (SELECT @m := 0) a) aa LIMIT 12) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS sussm, DATE_FORMAT(travel_date, '%Y-%m') TIME FROM team_user_customer_ref GROUP BY TIME) b ON a.months = b.time ORDER BY a.months

SELECT a.months, IFNULL(ROUND(b.sussm), 0)total FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(mon) = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT (CURRENT_DATE, 5) - 1, '-0', mon) ELSE CONCAT(LEFT (CURRENT_DATE, 5) - 1, '-', mon) END months FROM (SELECT @m := @m + 1 mon FROM team_user_customer_ref, (SELECT @m := 0) a) aa LIMIT 12) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS sussm, DATE_FORMAT(travel_date, '%Y-%m') TIME FROM team_user_customer_ref GROUP BY TIME) b ON a.months = b.time ORDER BY a.months

SELECT COUNT(cn.cd) AS Num, (SELECT CRI_NAME FROM cn_region_info WHERE CRI_CODE = ct.CRI_SUPERIOR_CODE) AS SUPERIOR_name FROM cn_region_info ct LEFT JOIN (SELECT LEFT(idcard, 6) AS cd FROM customer) cn ON cn.cd = ct.CRI_CODE WHERE cn.cd LIKE concat(concat(#{place_code}),'%') GROUP BY SUPERIOR_name ORDER BY Num DESC limit 7

SELECT COUNT(cn.cd) AS Num, (SELECT CRI_NAME FROM cn_region_info WHERE CRI_CODE = ct.CRI_SUPERIOR_CODE) AS SUPERIOR_name FROM cn_region_info ct LEFT JOIN (SELECT LEFT(idcard, 6) AS cd FROM customer) cn ON cn.cd = ct.CRI_CODE WHERE cn.cd NOT LIKE concat(concat(#{place_code}),'%') GROUP BY SUPERIOR_name ORDER BY Num DESC limit 7
